msContents.summary: This edition of the Amarakoṣa includes a Sinhalese commentary by Wimalajoti Thero, based on previous printed commentaries in Sinhalese and Sanskrit as well as, according to the preface, manuscript evidence.

listBibl.bibl: Vogel, Claus. 2013. Indian Lexicography. Revised edition. München: P. Kirchheim.

encodingDesc.p: ISO 15919 transliteration, apart from ṃ for anusvāra and ṛ for vocalic ṛ. Underscore to indicate explicit virāma.

body.head: namassarvajñāya.
body.p:
mē ślokaya budun_gē naisarggika guṇānusmaraṇayen_ buddha
sēvāva karaṇulæbēvayi yana abhiprāyen_ kiyanaladæyi mē nāma
liṅgānuśāsanayehi arttha kiyana væḍitara ācāryyayan_gē sammatayi.
brahma viṣṇu maheśādi sevā kiyana ladæyi samahara ācāryyayan_gē
matayi. bhaṭṭojidīkṣitācāryyātmaja bhānudīkṣitācārīhu gurusevā
dak_vana bavak_ mut_ buddhasēvā novet_yayida amarācāryyayan_
saugatavīmehi hetunætæyida dæḍisē kiyati. mē ācāryyayan_gē
druṣṭi virodha heyin_ kiyana pamaṇak_ vinā bhāratī tomō guru
sevā artthaya sphuṭa nokaran_nīya. maheśvara nam_ ācāryyayan_
visin_ viracitavū amarakoṣa viveka nam_ vyākhyānayehi mē buddhādi
kisiveku nodak_vā ślokārttha pamaṇak_ kiyati.
body.head: purātana san_naya.
body.p:
śāstrārambhayehi sarvajñayan_vahan_sēṭa pūjā vidhāna kaḷakal_hi
parahitānuśāsanayen_ viṣnopasamaya karan_nāvū puṇyasam_pattiya
ræs_karan_nō “yasya jñānadayāsindhoḥ” yanādī mē ślokaya
dæk_vūha: jñāna, samasta vastuviṣayavū parijñānayen_ hā; dayā, duḥkha
yen_ samuddharaṇavāñjā lakṣaṇavū karuṇāyen; sindhoḥ, sāgaraya
vænivū nohot_ uktalakṣaṇavū jñānadayādedenāṭa vipula dhāra
heyin_ sāgaraya vænivū; agādhasya, anut_ visin_ pātālatala no
dak_nā lada jñānadayādedenāgē keḷavara ætiheyin_ pirisin̆dagata
nohæk_kāvū gāmbhīryya æti; yasya, yam_ sarvajñavarayakugē; guṇāḥ,
maitrīkṣamopaśamādī guṇayō; anaghāḥ, rāgādidoṣa rahitayō da;
dhīrāḥ, paṇḍitavaruṇi; akṣayaḥ, parama karuṇādī guṇaśālitvayen_
parahita sukhasampādanayehilā kṣayak_ næt_tāvū hevat_ virāmayak_
næt_tāvū nohot_ saṃsārayen_ sundarasthānayaṭa giya bava hetu
koṭageṇa ajarāmara heyin_ kṣayak_ næt_tāvū; saḥ, ē sarvajña
tema; śriye ca, trivargasampattiya piṇisada; amṛtāya ca, nivan_
piṇisada; sevyatām, topa visin_ sevunā læbēvā.

me ślokaya sarvajña sāgaratvayen_ rūpaṇaya heyin_ sarvajña
yan_ṭa hā sāgarayaṭa śleṣayi; mehi samudrayāgē agādhatva nam_
pātāla talaya nodæk_kahæki bavayi; anaghavū guṇayō nam_
ratnākaratvādīhuya; akṣayatva nam_ paripūrṇa bavayi; śrī nam_ śrīdeva
tāya; amṛta nam_ amāyayi datayutu. “yasya jñāna dayāsindhoḥ”
yanādiyen_ iṣṭadevatāśrīrvāda dæk_vūhu. “śriye ca amṛtāya ca”
yan_nen_ sakalajñānapravṛttiya phalapramāṇa heyin_ pravṛttiphala
dæk_vūhu.

me ślokayehi śleṣayen_ taman_ karaṇa śāstrayāgēda
svarūpa sīha hē mesē datayutu: jñānadayā, kavitvavaktṛtvādiyehi
hō aṣṭādaśa vidyāsthānayehi jñānadāna sampattiya hetukoṭa
geṇa; sindhoḥ, sāgaraya vænivū; agādhasya, anantaroktavū guṇa
yōgaya hetukoṭageṇa patul_ nodæk_ka hæk_kāvū; yasya, yam_
śāstrayak_hugē; guṇāḥ, laghutva viṣpaṣṭatvādi guṇayō; anaghāḥ,
śubhahetuhuda; he dhīrāḥ, paṇḍitavaruṇi; akṣayaḥ, sampūrṇavū; saḥ,
ē jñānadayāsindhu temē hevat_ mē nāmaliṅ_gānuśāsanaya tema.
śriye ca, trivargasampattiya piṇisada nohot_ vāṅmaya śil_pa dænīma
lakṣaṇakoṭa æti svārtthasampattiya taddhetukatrivargahetuvū parārttha
sampattīya yana mē svārttha sampat_ parārttha sampat_ deka piṇisa da;
amṛtāya ca, ē svārtthasampattiyenudu puṇya jñāna sambhārayen_
yatnayen_ siddhavan_nāvū mokṣaya piṇisada; sevyatām, śruti
cintā vyākhyānādi lakṣaṇavū sēvāva karaṇu læbēvā.

mē śāstrapakṣayehi ‘dānan_dāḥ’ yana vākyayehi ḍudāñ_ dāne
yana dhātuhu keren_ (sampadādibhyaḥ kvip_ ca) yi kvip_ pratyaya kaḷa
kal_hi dā kiyā dvē. “jñānasya dāḥ tasyā ī lakṣmī jñānade” yi vākya
geṇa ṣaṣṭhīsamāsaya koṭa ‘jñānade’ śabdaya siddhakal_hi ohu keren_
tṛtīyā kaḷa kala ‘jñānadayā’ yi kiyā rūpaya dvēyayi datayutuyi.
